prestazioni: Engine swap to Hyundai Lambda II 3.8L V6 (G6DA) with forged internals (Manley connecting rods, JE pistons, ACL race bearings) and a custom billet crankshaft by Callies for 8,000 RPM reliability, paired with a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and a Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate for 12 psi of boost, targeting 450 whp on E85 fuel with a Motec M150 ECU for precise tuning and launch control

Full custom 3.5-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust system by Burns Stainless with equal-length headers, 4-2-1 merge collectors, and a MagnaFlow 304 stainless steel muffler for optimized scavenging and aggressive sound tuning, paired with a custom intercooler core by PWR (800x300x76mm) and a Bosch 044 fuel pump with ID1000 injectors for E85 compatibility

Kia Borrego EX-specific suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (custom valving for 2.5-ton SUV weight), Eibach Pro-Street S sway bars (28mm front, 25mm rear), and polyurethane bushings by SuperPro (part numbers SPF1052K, SPF1053K) for reduced body roll, paired with a custom torque arm by Cusco to eliminate rear axle hop under hard acceleration
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny widebody kit (Borrego-specific, not generic SUV kit) with carbon fiber fenders, custom front splitter, and rear diffuser, designed for 3-inch wider track and aggressive stance, paired with 22x10.5 ET15 front and 22x12 ET20 rear wheels by Work Emotion CR Kiwami in matte black with Toyo R888R tires (275/30/22 front, 305/25/22 rear)

Custom carbon fiber hood by Seibon with a 3-inch cowl scoop for intercooler ducting, paired with a custom front bumper lip by Varis (Borrego-specific, not generic SUV lip) and a rear wing by APR Performance (GT-250 model, carbon fiber, 3D adjustable) mounted on custom aluminum pedestals for 150+ mph stability

Full interior overhaul with Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shells, Alcantara inserts) and custom 6-point roll cage by Custom Cages (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly, Borrego-specific design), paired with a Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede) and a custom gauge cluster by Defi (BF series, 60mm oil pressure, boost, and EGT gauges) mounted in a carbon fiber dash overlay by 3D Carbon
